faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Merrick typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the treatment method required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a cockroach problem in Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Merrick residents. Cockroach infestations require immediate attention, and our team is ready to respond quickly to assess your situation and begin treatment to eliminate the problem as soon as possible.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Merrick, NY?
faqs.answer: Merrick homes most commonly deal with German cockroaches (found in kitchens and bathrooms) and American cockroaches (often in basements and crawl spaces). Oriental cockroaches can also appear in damp areas. Our technicians identify the species and customize treatment accordingly for maximum effectiveness.

faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize the safety of your family and pets. We use EPA-approved products and modern application techniques that effectively eliminate cockroaches while minimizing exposure risks. Our technicians will provide specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
